subject: [RFC PATCH 17/40] mm: page_alloc: superpageblock-aware contiguous and higher order allocation

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new allocation strategy that leverages superpage block (SPB) metadata to find contiguous ranges of free pages, making large and contiguous allocations more efficient. It adds tracking of contiguous allocations in SPB metadata and modifies the compaction algorithm to use this information for THP/mTHP and high-order unmovable/reclaimable allocations. The patch also includes a fallback mechanism to traditional compaction if the SPB approach fails.
